Goodness in every sip

Nature’s finest,
bottled for you.

We blend ripe fruit with botanical ingredients to make a drink that feels bright, refreshing and naturally satisfying.

Discover ingredients →

Mango

Rich in vitamins and antioxidants.

Passionfruit

Bright flavour with natural plant goodness.

Ginger

A warm, zesty lift in every sip.

Turmeric

Earthy, golden and naturally vibrant.

Our story

Made with nature.
Made for you.

Frutéo started with a simple belief: fruit drinks should taste like fruit. We source bright ingredients, blend in small batches and keep every recipe refreshingly straightforward.

Nothing loud. Nothing artificial. Just full flavour, carefully bottled.

The Frutéo Team ♡
100%Natural ingredients
0%Artificial anything
1000+Happy customers
